name: cactai-skeleton
description: Cactai app template. Fork this repo to start building. You own this code after forking. Imports rendering primitives and the platform HTTP client; all agent logic and IP lives on the Cactai platform server.

pnpm.//: Overrides narrowed in v1.3.6 to ONLY the private packages (mui, devshell). The six public @cactai-io/* packages now resolve from GitHub Packages so the committed lockfile matches what a forked customer app sees. Local-dev workflow change: edits to the public-six packages no longer flow into skeleton via link — bump the package version and republish (or `pnpm install --force` with a temporary link override) to pick them up.
